title: UKAEA Annual Report and Accounts 2024/25 - HC 1006
body: "UKAEA’s mission is to lead the delivery of sustainable fusion energy and maximise the scientific and economic benefit.  This document reports on UKAEA’s activities and financial performance for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  Presented to Parliament pursuant to Sections 3(5) and 4(3) of the Atomic Energy Act 1954.  Ordered by the House of Commons to be printed on 17 July 2025. "
